economic_notes: Government business enterprises include Amik Logging Limited Partnership and 2500845 Ontario Inc. Nation holds interest in Shekak Power generating facility (OEFC class D share), Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth LP, Landmark Inn Limited Partnership, NE-DAA-KII-ME-NAAN Inc. (forest management), Matawa Development GP Inc., and OFN Asset Management GP Corp. Distributions from Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (1.7% of provincial gross gaming revenues) restricted to community development, health, education, cultural and economic development.
notes: Nation adopted PS 3400 Revenue standard effective April 1, 2023 applied prospectively - deferred revenue lines are large and affect comparability. Two GBEs (Amik Logging LP and 2500845 Ontario Inc.) accounted for under modified equity method and not consolidated. Consolidated entities are Constance Lake First Nation Band and Constance Lake Education Authority. Large portfolio investments of $33.16M primarily in GICs. ISC funding calculated as sum of Fixed, Grant, Flexible, Block Funding lines plus First Nations and Inuit Health Branch. Tangible capital assets net book value not extractable from text provided (Schedule 1 reference only). Accounts receivable balance not separately stated in provided text. Deferred revenue current year figure of $22,884,857 represents new deferrals recorded in year per Note 7.
